category_sources: Official getclipboard.app page describes The Clipboard Project as a clipboard manager.
source_facts.description says cut, copy, and paste anything from the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is Slackadays/Clipboard and README presents The Clipboard Project.
Official homepage heading uses The Clipboard Project.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Docs link and points to GitHub for detailed help.
Official homepage says the GitHub Wiki has additional information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Slackadays/Clipboard, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage calls it a clipboard manager and shows cb copy usage for text and files.
source_facts.description says cut, copy, and paste from the terminal.
